description.initial: An exposed cargo platform at Nephelia's eastern edge. Crates and barrels are scattered across it - among them, one marked with Captain Zara's symbol. The wind here is something else entirely, unpredictable and sharp. The platform's edge is not railed.
description.return: The treacherous Windy Platform. The wind still howls, but you know its patterns now.
description.atmospheric: Wind screams past your ears, drowning out all other sound. The platform creaks and sways with each gust.

south.blockedMessage: Beyond the platform's edge is only open sky and the ocean far, far below. You cannot proceed this way.

east.blockedMessage: The platform ends here. Nothing but sky beyond.

items.itemMessage: You have picked up Zara's very heavy Cargo. Bring it back to her!

interactables.name: Cargo
interactables.examineText: Various crates and barrels have been left here, either forgotten or abandoned due to the dangerous conditions. Most bear shipping marks from distant ports.

interactables.name: Safety Rope
interactables.examineText: A rope that once served as a safety line has mostly frayed away. Only a few feet remain attached to a metal ring bolted into the platform.
interactables.interactionText: You grab the remaining rope, using it to steady yourself against the wind. It helps, but barely.
